title: azalea × kosteriana
intro: Azalea × kosteriana, also known as Koster's camellia or Koster's azalea, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the heath family, Ericaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Azalea × kosteriana include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Azalea × kosteriana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
